headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片寥寥
headlineEn: Obsession Leads Today's Trending, Few New Releases
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅一部新片。《痴迷》《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》成热搜焦点。
summaryEn: No movies released today, only 1 new this week. Obsession, Silo, and Enola Holmes 3 top trending.

industryHighlights.text: 本周《穿普拉达的女王2》跻身热搜榜单
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 enters this week's trending list

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》持续受关注
industryHighlights.en: Minions and the Big Monster remains popular
Multiple blockbusters like Avatar: The Last Airbender upcoming
